rule_text: The Icon Callout Box is a light-blue accent-shape box (Light Blue #E6F0F9 fill) containing a short blue headline, with a white icon badge (White #ffffff) that straddles the box's left edge so the edge runs through the badge's center (half-on / half-off the box). Used for supporting 'proof point' statements (dosing convenience, time-to-effect, etc.).
intent: Establish the canonical structure of the icon callout box proof-point component.
summary: Icon Callout Box: Light Blue #E6F0F9 fill, short blue headline, white #ffffff icon badge straddling left edge center, for 'proof point' statements.
